title: Mental Health Evaluation * Older Adults - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Mental Health Evaluation * Older Adults 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Adolescents Children Adolescents Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues AIDS/HIV Issues Children Domestic Violence Issues Grade School Students Hispanic/Latino Community Homelessness Issues Immigration Issues Infants/Toddlers LGBTQ2+ Issues Native American Community Older Adults Perinatal Depression Veterans Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF DESCHUTES COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SENIORS MENTAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health consultations, evaluations, treatment, and case management for seniors in care facilities and referred from private medical practitioners. Enhanced care outreach services include intensive case management, counseling, and behavioral interventions. 2577 NE Courtney Drive Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Adults 65 and older and people under age 65 who are homebound due to a physical disability or persistent mental illness. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Some services available evenings and weekends by arrangement. Email (541) 322-7500 9 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DESCHUTES COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SENIORS MENTAL HEALTH
